name: quick-text
title: Quick Text
description: Rewrite, fix, and transform text instantly
author: Carloss616

commands.name: quick-text
commands.title: Quick Text
commands.description: Modify the currently selected text using your local AI models

preferences.name: ollamaUrl
preferences.title: Ollama Server URL
preferences.description: The URL of your local Ollama instance (default: http://localhost:11434)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
